step3_h1_synthetic_refresh.notes: Strong quality lift vs baseline; false-refusal still slightly high

step4_h2_soften_refusal.what_changed: Broad post-gen refusal soften to clarify

step4b_h2_grounded_rescue.notes: Recovered from step4 regression; similar to v1

step6_h4_symbol_retrieval.what_changed: Retrieval rerank for explicit dotted symbols
step6_h4_symbol_retrieval.notes: Current champion: improves manual and drops false-refusal to 0.0303

step7_h5_citation_retry.notes: No material improvement vs champion; not retained

step8_hybrid_rrf.notes: Rejected: RRF score scale mismatched confidence thresholds, causing near-universal refusals

step8b_hybrid_rrf_calibrated.what_changed: Hybrid retrieval (RRF ranking + dense-scale confidence score)
step8b_hybrid_rrf_calibrated.notes: Validated fix and safety recovery to parity with champion; no net uplift vs best run, so not promoted

step10_reranker_cross_encoder.notes: Improves champion on manual (0.7273 -> 0.7576), holdout (0.7000 -> 0.7500), and false-refusal (0.0303 -> 0.0000) with synthetic unchanged
